extortion.description: Founded in 1991, Falco Electronics is a prominent designer and manufacturer specializing in a diverse range of magnetic-based electronic components and assemblies. With operations established in the USA, Mexico, China, and India, Falco has been a key player in the industry for over three decades. Renowned for its ability to deliver effective solutions, Falco has earned the status of a preferred supplier in the power conversion, energy metering, and solar inverter sectors.
